name: oh-my-docs
description: Monorepo for managing Oh My Codex, Oh My Claude Code, and Oh My OpenAgent documentation together.

scripts.build: npm run build:codex && npm run build:claudecode && npm run build:openagent
scripts.lint: npm run lint:codex && npm run lint:claudecode && npm run lint:openagent
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/codex && npm install --prefix apps/claudecode && npm install --prefix apps/openagent
